best.explanation: Belgas looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.6-1.1 m, 195 kJ, 12 s period, workable consistency 52/100, and good wind at 9 km/h.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: scan from the dunes first because banks and channels shift fast.
best.shortExplanation: Belgas is an open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything · label Rare window, Medium confidence · 0.6-1.1 m · 195 kJ · 12 s period · good wind at 9 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 103 kJ, 13 s period, workable consistency 52/100, and wind is the main risk.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a fun-sized window for Fun progression, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 128 kJ, 12 s period, workable consistency 54/100, and wind is the main risk.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.
